data.title: Global construction equipment market valued at $192.59 billion in 2025, expected to reach $283.22 billion by 2031.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of January 19, 2026, the global construction equipment market is set for significant expansion, with a value of USD 192.59 billion in 2025. It is projected to grow from USD 205.38 billion in 2026 to reach USD 283.22 billion by...

data.title: Sherritt reports $7.7M dividends in Q4 2025, totaling $26.0M for the year, double from 2024 - CEO comments on progress.
data.description: Sherritt International Corporation (TSX:S) based in Toronto disclosed its production outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. In the last quarter of 2025, Sherritt obtained $7.7 million in dividends from Energas S.A. in Canada, accumulating to $26.0 million for the year, which is twice the amount received in 2024, which was $13.0 million. Dr. Peter Hancock, the Interim Chief Executive Officer of Sherritt, remarked on the results, expressing his views since taking on the role in December.

data.title: Opus One Gold closes 2nd private placement: 5,235,000 units sold at $0.065 each, totaling $340,275; each unit contains a share and a warrant.
data.description: In Montreal on January 19, 2026, Opus One Gold Corporation (OOR: TSXV) announced the final closing of a non-brokered private placement. They sold 5,235,000 units at $0.065 per unit, raising $340,275 in gross proceeds. Each unit includes one common share and one common share purchase warrant. The warrant allows the holder to buy one common share at $0.10 per share for 24 months after the placement closes.

data.title: Microchip adds SDI IP cores, Quad CoaXPress Bridge Kit to enhance video ecosystem for developers.
data.description: Integrated video solution packages bundle together hardware components, development tools, IP cores, and reference designs to simplify the development process and enhance security measures.
Evergold reveals alterations in management and board lineup.

data.title: AirBoss announces resignation of Jo-Anne O'Connor from its Board of Directors due to other commitments.
data.description: In Newmarket, Ontario on January 19, 2026, AirBoss of America Corp. (TSX: BOS) (OTCQX: ABSSF) revealed that Jo-Anne O’Connor has stepped down from its Board of Directors on January 16, 2026. This departure is attributed to O’Connor's other professional responsibilities. The Company expressed appreciation for O’Connor's input and extends well wishes for her future pursuits.

data.title: Barrick Mining appoints Helen Cai as CFO, effective March 1, 2026, following Graham Shuttleworth's departure after year-end results.
data.description: In Toronto on January 19, 2026, Barrick Mining Corporation appointed Helen Cai as the Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Ms. Cai is set to take over the role on March 1, 2026, succeeding Graham Shuttleworth, who is departing Barrick post the disclosure of the Company's year-end outcomes. There will be an overlap period where Ms. Cai will collaborate with Mr. Shuttleworth to facilitate a seamless handover before his exit.

data.title: ATS CFO Ryan McLeod resigns, effective Feb 15, 2026, Anne Cybulski to be interim CFO. Search for permanent replacement ongoing.
data.description: In Cambridge, Ontario, ATS Corporation (TSX: ATS) (NYSE: ATS) disclosed that Ryan McLeod is stepping down from his position as Chief Financial Officer (CFO) to explore an opportunity in a different industry. Mr. McLeod's last day with the company will be on February 15, 2026. Anne Cybulski, VP of Corporate Controller, will take over as interim CFO following Mr. McLeod's exit while a search for a new permanent CFO is initiated. Anne Cybulski will hold the interim position until a suitable replacement is found.

data.title: Brad Dever appointed as Chief Commercial Officer & Managing Director at CloudAvanti on Jan 19, boosting firm's growth in North America.
data.description: In a significant move for CloudAvanti, Brad Dever has recently joined the company on January 19th. His appointment as Chief Commercial Officer and Managing Director is set to bolster the firm's commercial leadership as it expands its operations throughout North America. With this new role, Brad will spearhead the development of go-to-market strategies, drive client expansion initiatives, and cultivate strategic partnerships for the company. This development marks a key milestone in CloudAvanti's growth trajectory, with Brad's vast experience expected to play a pivotal role in scaling the business.
EC Pres. von der Leyen is invited to join Trump's Gaza "board of peace."

data.title: Vitalik Buterin urges a revamped DAO model for onchain disputes and governance, shifting focus from token-voting to core infra like oracles and onchain courts.
data.description: Renowned Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin emphasizes the need for Decentralized Autonomous Organizations (DAOs) to evolve beyond basic token-voting treasuries. He suggests a redesign towards supporting critical infrastructure functions such as oracles and on-chain courts. Buterin's statement highlights the importance of enhancing DAO capabilities to fulfill more complex roles in the digital ecosystem. This shift would require DAOs to adopt new functionalities and structures to effectively contribute to the operational aspects of decentralized systems.

data.title: Formula 1 champ Sebastian Vettel to receive The Perfect World Foundation Award 2026 for environmental efforts.
data.description: Four-time Formula 1 World Champion Sebastian Vettel is set to be honored with The Perfect World Foundation Award in 2026. This recognition is in appreciation of his extensive efforts in promoting environmental and social causes, not only within the realm of sports but also in broader society. Vettel's impact has been instrumental in driving positive change and raising awareness. The award serves as a testament to the belief that influence brings about a responsibility to make a difference.

data.title: Bank of America tips Amazon, Carvana, and others to excel in upcoming earnings season, including Amazon.com Inc. and Carvana Co. Valuation boost expected for Amazon in 2026 due to AWS growth and AI capabilities.HomeAsHighlighted stocks for earnings season by Bank of America: Amazon.com Inc., Brookdale Senior Living Inc., Corning Inc., Vertiv Holdings Co, and Carvana Co. Amazon's AI utilization could lead to valuation improvements in 2026 as per BofA.
data.description: Bank of America has released a list of recommended stocks for the upcoming earnings season, including Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN), Brookdale Senior Living (NYSE: BKD), Corning Inc. (NYSE: GLW), Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE: VRT), and Carvana Co. (NYSE: CVNA). Analysts at BofA view Amazon as a strong investment due to potential growth in its Amazon Web Services (AWS) division and AI capabilities by 2026, which could lead to a higher valuation. Brookdale Senior Living has also been upgraded to a buy rating by the bank. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Noveon Magnetics raises $215M in Series C, led by One Investment Management, to boost U.S. rare earth magnet production.
data.description: A recent financing round spearheaded by One Investment Management is propelling the growth of domestic rare earth magnet production. This initiative is not only aiding in the expansion of Noveon Magnetics, Inc. (Noveon), a prominent U.S. manufacturer specializing in sintered rare earth permanent materials, but also facilitating a secondary share sale. The funding injection, occurring in San Marcos, Texas, on January 19, 2026, is crucial for supporting the scaling efforts of Noveon. This development emphasizes the increasing importance of domestic rare earth magnet production and strategic investments in the sector.

data.title: IBM introduces Enterprise Advantage, an AI-powered consulting service to aid businesses in scaling AI, boosting growth and innovation. ARMONK, N.Y., Jan. 19, 2026. #IBM #AI #Innovation.
data.description: IBM has introduced IBM Enterprise Advantage, an innovative consulting service powered by AI in Armonk, N.Y. on Jan. 19, 2026. This service aims to aid organizations in speeding up growth and fostering innovation by providing a secure platform, standardized practices, and AI assets that can be utilized multiple times. IBM (NYSE: IBM) is behind this new initiative, marking a significant development in the industry. It offers a unique approach to consulting services which is expected to drive companies towards success in a fast-evolving business landscape.

data.title: 2/3 investment managers use AI in front office, SimCorp study finds: 200 exec survey shows rise in AI adoption, with innovation driving tech investments.
data.description: Recent findings from a yearly survey of 200 buy-side executives reveal a notable surge in AI adoption when compared to the previous year. Surprisingly, innovation has taken the top spot as the primary factor driving technology and operations investments for the first time in three years. Firms prioritize vendor stability, underscoring the importance of reliability in their decision-making process.
